scripts.build: npm -w client run build && (npm -w server run build || echo 'server: build script not defined')
scripts.lint: npm -w client run lint && (npm -w server run lint || echo 'server: lint script not defined')
scripts.verify:client: npm -w client run build && npm -w client test
scripts.verify:server: npm -w server test && npm -w server run lint
scripts.verify:e2e: npx playwright install --with-deps && npm -w client run e2e
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify:client && npm run verify:server && npm run verify:ciphertext && npm run verify:e2e && npm run verify:db && npm run verify:load
